intent: The professor introduces the Auregate, then closes with a warning shaped by the conviction the player gave Vec (if they spoke first) — foreshadowing the incident.

n0.text: Settle, settle. You are here because the Order believes you can be trusted with a Nudge.

n1.text: The Road is the shape of what should happen. A Gatewright reads it, and gently helps the world keep to it.

n2.text: At fifteen you each take a discipline. Tomorrow's Fair shows you the five. Watch closely.

close_protect.text: And you, Caden — I'm told you mean to keep people safe. Hear me, then: a Nudge will one day ask you to let some you could save go unsaved. Bearing that is the discipline. Not the reaching.

close_purpose.text: And you, Caden — still looking for your shape, I hear. The Road will hand you one. Whether it fits is a question you answer for the rest of your life.

close_unsure.text: And you, Caden — undecided, they say. Then listen hardest of anyone tomorrow. The uncertain make the finest Gatewrights, or the very worst. Rarely the middle.

close_none.text: Tomorrow, then. Watch closely — all of you.
